description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof and a clean, geometric facade with large windows and minimalistic lines. The front yard is landscaped with palm trees and a central garden area, bordered by a low fence and a driveway leading to a single-car garage. The exterior walls are predominantly white with dark trim, and the structure includes multiple rectangular window openings on all sides. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a spacious patio area, partially enclosed by the building's L-shaped layout. The property is surrounded by a low, dark-colored fence, providing a sense of privacy while maintaining an open, urban feel. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a landscaped front yard, and a single-car garage, surrounded by a low fence. The design is minimalistic and emphasizes open, functional spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a partially enclosed patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, side windows, and the transition to the backyard garden.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the driveway, garage, landscaped garden with palm trees, and the main entrance gate.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing additional windows and the continuation of the patio and garden area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
